title: ESP32 BLE File Transfer
summary: An embedded systems project implementing file transfer over Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) using an ESP32.
impact: Demonstrates a practical approach to transferring binary data over BLE by designing a custom packetization and reconstruction layer on top of GATT.
details: Implemented BLE-based communication using the ESP32 acting as a GATT server to receive file data from a client device.
Designed a packetization strategy to split files into small chunks due to BLE payload size limits, then reassembled them on-device.
Addressed BLE throughput and reliability constraints by sequencing packets and managing partial transfers.
